definitions: An additive manufacturing process in which a liquid binding agent is selectively deposited to join powder materials.
A 3D printing technology that uses a print head to apply a liquid binder onto a bed of powder, layer by layer, to build a solid object.
examples: Binder Jetting is known for its speed.
The company specializes in Binder Jetting.
They chose Binder Jetting for the prototype.
